description_long: This is a modern Audi coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a light color. The front features a prominent Audi grille with horizontal slats, flanked by sharp, angular headlights and a detailed license plate. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and large alloy wheels with a five-spoke design, as well as subtle character lines running along the body. The rear is characterized by slim, wraparound taillights, a rear license plate, and a subtle roof spoiler, giving the car a sporty yet practical appearance. The windows are tinted and the roofline is gently curved, providing a balanced silhouette. The overall design suggests a premium, urban-oriented coupe with a focus on both style and functionality.
description: A sleek, modern Audi coupe car with a light exterior, distinctive grille, four doors, and sporty alloy wheels. The design is both stylish and practical, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold Audi grille, angular headlights, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, large alloy wheels, and smooth body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays slim taillights, rear license plate, and subtle roof spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the door arrangement and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
